name: BoltCatalogSize
summary: The BoltCatalogSize class represents a control to select the bolt size using the bolt catalog. Bolt catalog controls always need to be in pairs, meaning in every dialog there has to be a BoltCatalogStandard and a BoltCatalogSize control. The property BoltCatalogStandard.LinkedBoltCatalogSize sets to which BoltCatalogSize the control is linked.

constructors.name: BoltCatalogSize
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.
